---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in emhash
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

## Bug Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Environment
- emhash version: [e.g., hash_table8 v1.1.0]
- Compiler: [e.g., gcc 13.2, clang 18]
- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- C++ Standard: [e.g., C++17]

## Minimal Reproducible Example
```cpp
#include "hash_table8.hpp"
// ...
```

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Additional Context
Any other context, crash logs, sanitizer output, etc.
